_comment: Model routing policy for the agent OS. The 'brain' does judgment; the 'hands' do cheap high-volume execution. This file documents the intended routing; the actual wiring is done via Claude Code Router (see docs/setup-routing.md). SWE-bench Verified (Jul 2026): Mythos 5 95.5, Fable 5 95.0, Opus 4.8 88.6 (owned via Max), GPT-5.5 82.6, GLM/DeepSeek ~77-80. There is no Fable-level model outside Anthropic; the brain is already the best affordable option.

hands.note: Cheap models fumble code edits (wrong line numbers, malformed hunks). They READ and DRAFT; the brain EDITS.

privacy_line.rule: Personal/identity data, private files, secrets, and any user PII NEVER go to a HOSTED cheap third-party API (z.ai/DeepSeek are China-hosted).
privacy_line.escape_hatch: GLM weights are open: self-host on your own box for anything near sensitive data, so nothing leaves your infra. The hosted cheap APIs see only non-sensitive code and public text.
privacy_line.enforcement: Route PII-touching tasks to the brain (Anthropic) or a self-hosted model; keep the cheap hosted providers on background/no-PII work only.
